# TURKAY.EU — Integrated Digital Solutions

## About
TURKAY is a technology company providing AI, cloud, and software solutions.
Offices in Istanbul (Turkey) and Bratislava (Slovakia).
Founded in 2014.

## Services
- AI & Machine Learning consulting and implementation
- Cloud & DevOps (AWS, Azure, GCP)
- Full-Stack Development (Web & Mobile)
- Cybersecurity consulting
- Enterprise system integration
- Digital transformation consulting

- Bratislava: SKY PARK Offices, Bottova 7939/2A, 811 09
- TR Phone: +90 (551) 952 63 38
- SK Phone: +421 915 455 756
